scripts.bundle: node scripts/bundle.js && node scripts/patch-cdn.js && node scripts/patch-supabase-init.js
scripts.build: npm run bundle && if exist www rmdir /s /q www && xcopy src www /E /I /Y
scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.android: npm run build && npx cap add android
scripts.sync:windows: set JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr && npm run build && npx cap sync && cd android && gradlew assembleDebug
